name: galaxy-screen-starname-msgdat-boundaryfix
description: Fix an RE-confirmed in-world screen ConstMsg lookup that crosses from group 0x16 into the group 0x18 star-name table.
verified: ENCODED 2026-06-21: FUN_0053f2d0 static screen construction pushes g0x16/s0x86, but constmsg group 0x16 ends at sub0x7a. The original flat index is 1410, which is group 0x18/sub7 (알비스). Same-length call-site immediate patches only; does not add speculative records.

patches.note: FUN_0053f2d0 static screen text: subId 0x86 -> 0x07 (flat constmsg 1410: 알비스)
FUN_0053f2d0 static screen text: group 0x16 -> 0x18 for the star-name table
